status.title: Status
status.description: Processing result for this source: completed or failed.

sourceName.title: Source name
sourceName.description: Original uploaded file name or URL-derived file name.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Transcription provider used for the final transcript.

model.title: Model
model.description: Transcription model used for the final transcript.

durationMinutes.title: Minutes
durationMinutes.description: Source media duration rounded to minutes for display.

transcriptEndTime.title: Transcript end
transcriptEndTime.description: Last timestamp covered by the transcript in seconds.

billableMinutes.title: Billable minutes
billableMinutes.description: Started transcription minutes charged after successful artifact generation.

charged.title: Charged
charged.description: Whether the configured billing charge succeeded.

mp3Url.title: MP3 URL
mp3Url.description: Signed browser-download link for normalized MP3 audio.

txtUrl.title: Transcript URL
txtUrl.description: Signed browser-download link for readable TXT transcript.

jsonUrl.title: JSON URL
jsonUrl.description: Signed link for normalized transcript JSON.

srtUrl.title: SRT URL
srtUrl.description: Signed link for SRT subtitle export.

vttUrl.title: VTT URL
vttUrl.description: Signed link for VTT subtitle export.

qualityUrl.title: Quality report URL
qualityUrl.description: Signed link for quality audit JSON.

zipUrl.title: ZIP URL
zipUrl.description: Signed browser-download link for bundled artifacts.

mp3Key.title: MP3 key
mp3Key.description: Key-value store key for MP3 artifact.

txtKey.title: TXT key
txtKey.description: Key-value store key for TXT artifact.

jsonKey.title: JSON key
jsonKey.description: Key-value store key for JSON artifact.

srtKey.title: SRT key
srtKey.description: Key-value store key for SRT artifact.

vttKey.title: VTT key
vttKey.description: Key-value store key for VTT artifact.

qualityKey.title: Quality key
qualityKey.description: Key-value store key for quality report artifact.

zipKey.title: ZIP key
zipKey.description: Key-value store key for ZIP artifact.

artifactKeys.title: Artifact keys
artifactKeys.description: All generated artifact keys by file type.

artifactUrls.title: Artifact URLs
artifactUrls.description: All generated signed artifact URLs by file type.

warnings.title: Warnings
warnings.description: Quality warnings that did not fail the item.

failures.title: Failures
failures.description: Quality or processing failures for failed items.

error.title: Error
error.description: Human-readable error message when processing fails.

overview.title: Transcript results
overview.description: Primary result view with status, quality metrics, and direct artifact download links.
